title: Golden Corpus Manifest
description: Schema for the machine-checkable expected outcomes of golden corpus fixtures.

manifest_version.description: Schema/structure version of this manifest file.

fixture_version.description: Version of the fixture files. Bump when fixture content changes.

taxonomy_version.description: Version of VIOLATION_TAXONOMY.md. Bump when rule IDs are added/changed.

id.description: Unique fixture ID. Prefix: A=approve, R=reject, E=escalate, ADV=adversarial, CTX=context, TOK=token.

path.description: Path relative to the golden_corpus directory.

stage.description: Which pipeline stage this fixture primarily tests. 'parser' = parse_identity.py, 'validator' = validator_runner.py, 'integration' = multi-step pipeline test.

expected_parser.description: Whether parse_identity.py should succeed or return an error.

expected_parser_error.description: Expected error message substring from parse_identity.py. Only set when expected_parser is 'error'.

expected_parser_note.description: Note about parser behavior when expected_parser is 'success' but the behavior is non-obvious.

expected_decision.description: Expected LLM decision. null if the file never reaches the LLM (parser error or token overflow).

expected_policy_violations.description: Expected rule_id values in the policy_violations array. Empty array for clean approvals. null if the file never reaches the LLM.

notes.description: Human-readable explanation of what this fixture tests and why the expected outcome is correct.
